Class ReorderView.ReorderItemRow

java.lang.Object
com.project.view.manager.ReorderView.ReorderItemRow
Enclosing class:
ReorderView
public static class ReorderView.ReorderItemRow extends Object
Represents a row in the reorder table for inventory items.

Each row contains information about the item's current quantity, target quantity, and the calculated reorder amount. It also includes a selection flag for choosing items to reorder.

  • Constructor Details

    • ReorderItemRow

      public ReorderItemRow(String itemName, int currentQty, int targetQty, int reorderQty, boolean selected)
      Creates a new reorder item row.
      Parameters:
      itemName - the name of the inventory item
      currentQty - the current quantity in stock
      targetQty - the desired target quantity
      reorderQty - the quantity that needs to be reordered
      selected - whether the item is selected for reorder
